comments: TV mentions Bob Dylan playing at Earls Court tonight (Bob Dylan played 6 nights, 26 June - 1 July 1981)
This show is missing TV's wrap up comments at the end of the show.

track_listing.details: The Pact; LP-Fire Of Unknown Origin
